description_long: This is an ornate ceiling-mounted chandelier featuring six cylindrical lampshades arranged symmetrically around a central stem. The fixture is suspended by a decorative chain and canopy, with elegantly curved metal arms extending outward to support each lampshade. The arms are adorned with scrollwork details, adding a touch of classic sophistication. The lampshades appear to be made of a matte or frosted material, likely fabric or glass, which diffuses the light softly. The metal components have a smooth, possibly brushed or polished finish, contributing to the fixture's refined appearance. This chandelier is designed to provide ambient lighting in upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, dining rooms, or entryways.
description: A decorative ceiling-mounted chandelier with six cylindrical lampshades and ornate scrollwork arms, suspended by a chain. The fixture combines smooth metal and matte lampshades for a classic, elegant look.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all six lampshades evenly spaced, with the central stem and scrollwork arms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the fixture, the curvature of the arms, and the layered arrangement of the lampshades.
description_view_2: Frontal view identical to view 0, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the lampshades and central stem.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the scrollwork and the spatial relationship between the arms and lampshades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a classic, vintage-inspired design with ornate scrollwork arms and a symmetrical arrangement of cylindrical lampshades. Its elegant form and decorative details evoke a sense of timeless sophistication.
